blocks.content: Something recalculated in his face. Fast.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Aight. Tell him Daniel said what's up.
He stepped aside. A sophomore nearby caught the whole exchange and looked at me like I'd done something clever.

blocks.speaker: Sophomore
blocks.content: Bruh it was absolutely a move. Most freshmen don't figure that out until week three.
Smart. I used someone else's name as a shield and that's the word they had for it.

blocks.prompt: What does Larry tell himself walking away?

options.label: That was the right call. Whatever works.
You used his name. You didn't earn that.
Jonathan would've done the same thing.
